case_title: SALVADOR ASCENCIO VS. O.S.M, CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASCENCIO, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT O.S.M, CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASCENCIO, SALVADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O.S.M, CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $15,465.40 PRINCIPAL, $113.88 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,949.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
